title: carya ovalis f. fraxinifolia
intro: Carya ovalis f. fraxinifolia, also known as the white hickory or fraxinifolia hickory, is a variation of the hickory tree species, characterized by its white bark and edible nuts. The medicinal properties of Carya ovalis f. fraxinifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Carya ovalis f. fraxinifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
